full_text:
S214_pOme

Cell count /ml

1). Total cells: 4.8 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 1.9 x 106 /mL

Viability: 39.5%

Average size: 7.9 um

2). Total cells: 4.6 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 1.99 x 106 /mL

Viability: 42.8%

Average size: 7.8 um

Average of two counts: 4.7 x 106 /mL

Note: there were lot of cell aggregates when looked under the microscope

Total cell count: 4.7 x 106 / ml

Due to low cell count , no cells were cultured for RNA/DNA extraction

A) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 54 wells

54 wells x 40 µl = 2160 µl,

1000 cells/µl = 2.2*E6 cells

Divide them into two tubes of 1080 ul

→ take 235 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 1.1*E6 cells into two tubes. Spin down 1000 rpm at +4 for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 922 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omentum gel mix as below.

→ make 1080 ul of omentum gel mix in 1.5ml eppendorf

cells in medium → 922 ul

ome-gel → 153 µl

aprotinin → 0.7 µl

thrombin → 0.7 µl

Mix well and divide into two 1.5 ml tubes each 941 ul

fibrinogen to each tube one by one → 4.5 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL organoid culture medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 50 uL to make up to 350 uL per well

B) 96-well U plate

9 conditions x 4 wells/condition= 36 wells

36 wells x 10 µl = 384 µl → make 360 µl

1000 cells/µl = 3.6*E5 cells

→ take 80 ul of final cell suspension which corresponds to 3.5*E5 cells. Spin down 1000 rpm at +4 for 5 min. Resuspend the pellet in 332 ul of organoid culture medium, proceed with the omenutum gel mix as below.

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

cells in medium → 220

ome-gel → 51 µl

aprotinin → 0.2 µl

thrombin → 0.2 µl

fibrinogen → 1.5 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 150 uL medium

→ Next day add 7x concentrated drug as 25 uL to make up to 175 uL per well

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 200 ul of cell suspension corresponding to 1.0 *E6 cells for flow antibody staining for functional markers

→

Pellet the above cell suspension @400g, +4 for 6 min. Resuspend the pellet in 900ul of FACS buffer, proceed with the staining.

E) Sample for cryo

No cells were frozen

FACS staining was performed for d0 pOme samples according to the protocol with overnight storing of cell pellet in FACS staining buffer after primary ab staining followed by fixation and permeabilization. In addition, d0 unstained cells of the same samples as well as new compensation was run at the same time.

Treatment was initiated on day 1.

Drug treatment conditions:

control

olaparib 20uM

olaparib 40uM (only for flowcytometry)

pembro 10ug/mL

pembro 50ug/mL

GSK STING agonist 0.01uM

GSK STING agonist 0.25uM

GSK STING agonist 0.1uM

GSK STING agonist 1uM

Treatment plan:

Required volume of the 7x concentrated drug→

50 ul /well *6 for 48 wells + 25 ul / well*6 for 96 wells = 300 uL + 150 uL =450 uLà prepare 500 ul

Add 50 uL of 7x concentrated drug or DMSO to each of the 48 wells

Add 25uL of 7x concentrated drug or DMSO to each of the 96 wells

Dilute 1mM stock STING agonist to 0.1mM (100uM) in DMSO > 1ul of stock + 9 ul of DMSO

Fixation and processing for FACS on day 7

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

Compound | [Stock] | Location of the stock | [working] | 7x concentrated | Required volume of the 7x concentrated drug per 500 uL | Volume of the culture medium
DMSO (control) | 100 % | RT, lab | 0.2 % | 1.4 % | 7uL | 493 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 20 uM | 140 uM | 7 uL | 493 uL
Olaparib | 10 mM | -80 C | 40 uM | 280 ug / mL | 14 uL | 486 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 10 ug / mL | 70 ug / mL | 7 uL | 493 uL
Pembrolizumab | 5 mg / mL | -20 C | 50 ug / mL | 350 ug/ ml | 35 uL | 465 uL
 | | | | | | 
STING agonist | 0.1 mM | -80 C | 0.01 uM | 0.07 uM | 0.35 uL | 499.6
STING agonist | 0.1 mM | -80 C | 0.025 uM | 0.175 uM | 0.87 uL | 499.1
STING agonist | 1 mM | -80 C | 0.1 uM | 0.7 uM | 0.35 uL | 499.6 uL
STING agonist | 1 mM | -80 C | 1 uM | 7 uM | 3.5 uL | 496.5
